_comment: Education-feeds catalog (L7). A tiered address book of trusted feeds the self-updater harvests. Authoritative-first: only tier 'canonical' / authority 'primary' confirms a change; 'news_teacher_student' is curated secondary news on issues affecting teachers/students; the 'product_updates' layer (edtech/vendor) is OFF by default. Every feed is notated with category/authority/tier/purpose so the updater can prioritize and the curator (L8) can keep it accurate. URLs marked verified:false are SEED CANDIDATES pending curator validation (tools/seed_curator.py) — never assume an unverified URL is live or correct. Standards/program changes are advisory + human-verified; nothing is fabricated.

product_updates.note: edtech/vendor product-update feeds — OFF unless a teacher opts in

feeds.label: U.S. Dept of Education — news
feeds.purpose: federal education policy/funding news that affects teachers and students

feeds.label: Florida DOE — newsroom
feeds.purpose: Florida DOE program/policy announcements (newsroom may need an RSS link the curator discovers)
